hooks.command: cd /home/griffbrown/repos/hms-website/site && git add -A && if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then git commit -m "$(git diff --cached --stat | tail -1 | sed 's/^ */Session update: /')" -m 'Auto-committed on session close' -m 'Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>' && git push; fi
